name: pi-glance
description: A polished input surface extension for pi, with a rounded multiline editor and inline model/context/status glance.
author: linys77

scripts.test:dev: npm run build:dev --silent && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-boundaries.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-runtime-policy.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-footer-facts.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-git.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-git-refresher.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-state-git.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-state-inputs.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-render-git.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-render-segments.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-status-line.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-workspace-label.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-surface-layout.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-surface-parity.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-settings-catalog.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-segment-registry.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-pane-model.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-config.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-config-io.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-runtime.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-themes.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-readme.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-pane-render.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-session-start-order.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-glance-command-save.js
scripts.test:git: npm run build:dev --silent && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-git.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-git-refresher.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-state-git.js && node .tmp-git-dev/scripts/test-render-git.js
